result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  git-credential-manager [command] [options]

Options:
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  get          [Git] Return a stored credential
  store        [Git] Store a credential
  erase        [Git] Erase a stored credential
  configure    Configure Git Credential Manager as the Git credential helper
  unconfigure  Unconfigure Git Credential Manager as the Git credential helper
  diagnose     Run diagnostics and gather logs to diagnose problems with Git Credential Manager
  azure-repos  Commands for interacting with the Azure Repos host provider
  github       Commands for interacting with the GitHub host provider

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  git-credential-manager [command] [options]

Options:
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  get          [Git] Return a stored credential
  store        [Git] Store a credential
  erase        [Git] Erase a stored credential
  configure    Configure Git Credential Manager as the Git credential helper
  unconfigure  Unconfigure Git Credential Manager as the Git credential helper
  diagnose     Run diagnostics and gather logs to diagnose problems with Git Credential Manager
  azure-repos  Commands for interacting with the Azure Repos host provider
  github       Commands for interacting with the GitHub host provider

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands for interacting with the Azure Repos host provider

Usage:
  git-credential-manager azure-repos [command] [options]

Options:
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list <organization>             List all user account bindings
  bind <organization> <username>  Bind a user account to an Azure DevOps organization
  unbind <organization>           Remove user account binding for an Azure DevOps organization
  clear-cache                     Clear the Azure authority cache

commands.payload:
Description:
  Commands for interacting with the Azure Repos host provider

Usage:
  git-credential-manager azure-repos [command] [options]

Options:
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list <organization>             List all user account bindings
  bind <organization> <username>  Bind a user account to an Azure DevOps organization
  unbind <organization>           Remove user account binding for an Azure DevOps organization
  clear-cache                     Clear the Azure authority cache

result.stdout:
Description:
  Bind a user account to an Azure DevOps organization

Usage:
  git-credential-manager azure-repos bind [<organization> <username>] [options]

Arguments:
  <organization>  Azure DevOps organization name
  <username>      Username or email (e.g.: alice@example.com)

Options:
  --local         Target the local repository Git configuration
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  List all user account bindings

Usage:
  git-credential-manager azure-repos list [<organization>] [options]

Arguments:
  <organization>  (optional) Filter results by Azure DevOps organization name

Options:
  --show-remotes  Also show Azure DevOps remote user bindings for the current repository
  -v, --verbose   Verbose output - show remote URLs
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Configure Git Credential Manager as the Git credential helper

Usage:
  git-credential-manager configure [options]

Options:
  --system        Modify the system-wide Git configuration instead of the current user
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Run diagnostics and gather logs to diagnose problems with Git Credential Manager

Usage:
  git-credential-manager diagnose [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>  Output directory for diagnostic logs.
  --no-ui                Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands for interacting with the GitHub host provider

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github [command] [options]

Options:
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list              List all known GitHub accounts.
  login             Add a GitHub account.
  logout <account>  Remove a GitHub account.

commands.payload:
Description:
  Commands for interacting with the GitHub host provider

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github [command] [options]

Options:
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list              List all known GitHub accounts.
  login             Add a GitHub account.
  logout <account>  Remove a GitHub account.

result.stdout:
Description:
  List all known GitHub accounts.

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github list [options]

Options:
  --url <url>     URL of the GitHub instance to target, otherwise use GitHub.com
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  List all known GitHub accounts.

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github list [options]

Options:
  --url <url>     URL of the GitHub instance to target, otherwise use GitHub.com
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a GitHub account.

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github login [options]

Options:
  --url <url>             URL of the GitHub instance to target, otherwise use GitHub.com
  --username <username>   User name to authenticate with
  --device                Use device flow to authenticate
  --browser, --web        Use a web browser to authenticate
  --pat, --token <token>  Use personal access token to authenticate
  --force                 Force re-authentication even if a credential already exists for the account
  --no-ui                 Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add a GitHub account.

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github login [options]

Options:
  --url <url>             URL of the GitHub instance to target, otherwise use GitHub.com
  --username <username>   User name to authenticate with
  --device                Use device flow to authenticate
  --browser, --web        Use a web browser to authenticate
  --pat, --token <token>  Use personal access token to authenticate
  --force                 Force re-authentication even if a credential already exists for the account
  --no-ui                 Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help          Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Remove a GitHub account.

Usage:
  git-credential-manager github logout <account> [options]

Arguments:
  <account>  Account to remove

Options:
  --url <url>     URL of the GitHub instance to target, otherwise use GitHub.com
  --no-ui         Do not use graphical user interface prompts
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
